ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language in which the course is offered */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method of course delivery (in-person or virtual) */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the course */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the course */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students allowed */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the location */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person for the location */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course being scheduled */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the course is being held */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor assigned to the schedule */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the course */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the course */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the course */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the course */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the schedule */,
  "available_seats" INTEGER /* Number of available seats */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the instructor */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Short biography of the instructor */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization area of the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., student, administrator) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered in the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registrations" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registration */,
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the schedule being registered for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user registering for the course */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount_paid" TEXT /* Amount paid by the student */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the registration */,
  "discount_code" TEXT /* Discount code used (if any) */,
  "refund_amount" TEXT /* Amount refunded (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_schedule_id FOREIGN KEY ("schedule_id") REFERENCES schedules ("schedule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the registration being paid for */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount_paid" TEXT /* Amount paid by the student */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique transaction ID from the payment gateway */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_registration_id FOREIGN KEY ("registration_id") REFERENCES registrations ("registration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the registration being notified */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., registration confirmation, reminder) */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the recipient */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject of the email notification */,
  "body" TEXT /* Body content of the email notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_registration_id FOREIGN KEY ("registration_id") REFERENCES registrations ("registration_id")
)
